tech_news.title: Android 17 Beta 3 reveals Google is testing a new 'Priority Charging' feature (APK teardown) - Android Authority
tech_news.description: Android 17 Beta 3 includes hidden code for a new "Priority Charging" feature that pauses background activity to speed up charging.

tech_news.description: Devil May Cry 5 has apparently been leaked for Nintendo Switch 2 with the console getting a new Devil Hunter Edition.

tech_news.title: Apple Discontinues Mac Pro Desktop in Favor of the Mac Studio - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Apple Inc. on Thursday discontinued the Mac Pro desktop, its highest-end computer aimed at video editors, photographers and other advanced users.

tech_news.title: Anker’s wireless charging pad offers Qi2 speeds for $15 - The Verge
tech_news.description: During Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, you can snag Anker’s Qi2 wireless charging pad that offers 15W speeds for just $14.99. That’s like a dollar per watt.

tech_news.title: Ubisoft’s Cost-Cutting Crisis Could Put Its Biggest Games at Risk - Insider Gaming
tech_news.description: Ubisoft's cost cutting measures will lead us to getting worse games, with decreased scope and less quality.
